query:
SELECT a.author_id AS "author_id!: i64",
                  a.name AS "name!: String",
                  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books WHERE author_id = a.author_id)
                      AS "book_count!: i64"
             FROM authors a
            WHERE a.name LIKE ?1 COLLATE NOCASE
            ORDER BY a.name COLLATE NOCASE
            LIMIT ?2 OFFSET ?3
